JavaScript test scripts for string operations, arithmetic, and object coercion, including special cases.

## Folders

- **[11.06.02](11.06.02/README.md)**: JavaScript subtraction operation tests, including cases with numbers, strings, objects, and `isNaN` assertions.
- **[11.06.03](11.06.03/README.md)**: JavaScript arithmetic and concatenation test cases, including operations with NaN, Infinity, and `Number.MAX_VALUE`.
